original_request_verbatim: Plano de construcao - Backend e banco de dados do Sistema Integrado Pavageau. Este documento descreve, em texto corrido, como construir a camada de dados e a camada de servidor do Sistema Integrado Pavageau. Ele nao trata do frontend: o frontend de referencia ja existe no rascunho Pavageau v3.jsx e serve como contrato visual e funcional do que o backend precisa entregar. A regra que atravessa o plano inteiro e a mesma que rege o rascunho: nenhum numero e digitado duas vezes, o usuario preenche apenas fatos primarios (contratos, parcelas, lancamentos, custos fixos, processos), e tudo o mais - caixa, DRE, balanco, projecoes, inadimplencia, conversao - e derivado por calculo, nunca digitado nem editavel a mao.
interpreted_business_objective: Replace two hand-maintained Excel workbooks with a database-backed system in which the office enters only primary facts and every report is a derived, non-editable function of those facts, plus automated weekly monitoring of TJSP court-process movements.
problem_being_solved: The spreadsheets accumulated structural defects that discipline cannot fix: monthly cash typed over formulas breaking the balance chain; the same status spelled multiple ways and counted separately; ~15 spellings for 8 fee types; a partner with active contracts invisible on the dashboard; and 4 clients with instalments but no contract row.
desired_outcome: A Supabase/PostgreSQL backend where derived values are materialized read-only, three (four) transactional links guarantee no number is entered twice, and the already-validated TJSP scraper is wrapped rather than rewritten.
likely_users: Escritorio Pavageau - single office account (no roles in v1)
known_constraints: Frontend is out of build scope; it is the API contract
The validated TJSP scraper must not be rewritten (sha256 c9429f2a...)
Only the 3 most recent movements are captured, compared by deterministic key
Process passwords live in a vault; the DB stores only a reference
LGPD: Brazilian law-firm data; region sa-east-1
Gabriel writes any non-TJSP scraper himself; DataJud is rejected
explicit_requirements: Referential integrity between parcelas and contratos
Materialized indicator tables recomputed in the same transaction as the fact
Audit trail from day one, insert-only
Weekly radar run at a configurable time with a global concurrency lock
Technical error email with process number, status, message, step and timestamp
30-day inertia rule creating an idempotent task automatically
New movements enter task creation by manual curation
implicit_requirements: No column or endpoint may ever accept a calculated value
A timeout must not be mistaken for absence of movement
Machine-created rows must be distinguishable from human ones in the audit trail
non_negotiable_instructions: Do not rewrite consulta_tjsp_lote.py; changes go in adapters
Do not implement TJCE/TJBA scrapers or substitute an API for them
Never log, return, email, audit or screenshot a password
Implementation gates stay PENDING until proven
potential_contradictions: Source document claimed the scraper receives Excel and returns JSON and is fully validated; the canonical file confirms this, but an earlier superseded copy did not - resolved by hash adjudication (DEC-39)
Source document cited Pavageau v3.jsx which does not exist; resolved to FRONTEND_REFERENCE_PAVAGEAU.md (DEC-21, vendored DEC-40)
current_system_context: Two Excel workbooks (fluxo de caixa with DASHBOARD/CONFIG/JAN-DEZ; contratos with DASHBOARD/CONTRATOS/ENCERRADOS/PENDENTES/MENSAIS) plus a validated Python/DrissionPage TJSP batch scraper that ran 106 processes with 94 successes and 282 movements extracted.
definition_of_success: The office enters only primary facts; every report opens instantly from materialized tables that provably match a from-scratch recomputation; no user can overwrite a calculated number; the weekly radar runs unattended, detects new movements by deterministic key, and reports the 12 out-of-scope TJCE/TJBA processes as pending without failing the run.
